violations.description: Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. Meat and other food products was not properly dated.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Table that holds the grill has exposed wood.

Clean-in-place (CIP) equipment - Design and construction. — --Food contact surface of clean in place equipment was not cleaned properly. Area around deep fryer, grill had build up of grease, cobwebs, food debris.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. prep tables were not clean.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Hood contained excessive build up of grease.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Floors missing pieces. Ceiling falling down--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)* were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Walls, Ceiling, Floors were not clean. Had build up of grease.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
